notes: Fresh clean run after round-1 little-coder hit transient connection failures and aborted at 38/300. This re-run: 40 instances, server continuously healthy throughout 37 min, audit confirms 0 infra failures. Resolution rate 20% on the actual model attempts. Head-to-head on the SAME 40 instances: opencode 17/40 = 42.5%, claw-code 14/40 = 35.0%, little-coder 8/40 = 20.0%. little-coder underperforms the other two scaffolds by 15-22pp on identical instances — suggests pi-ai's iteration model or tool registry is less effective for SWE-bench than opencode's or claw's.
